creator: marcus@FreeBSD.org
text:
I do not want to _move_ the port to this fork.  For one, it's quite old.  It could be said it's as equally maintained as heas' version.  Moreover, I know that work will begin on a TLS transport for T+, and I know heas is tied into that.  I suspect that when that work is ratified in the IETF, this original branch will update.

That said, if you find value in what FB has done, I encourage you to submit a version of this fork as its own port.
